steps: File Form 5001 with French tax authorities to reclaim EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding tax on TotalEnergies SE dividends
Submit evidence to BNP Paribas Securities showing FR-NO treaty rate of 15% applies to Norwegian resident CLIENT08
Reference account 901234567 and ISIN FR0000120271 in all correspondence to expedite processing
